FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: AI capex fuels global growth expectations

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Bullish Confluence from Stablecoin Adoption and Institutional Crypto Infrastructure
tldr_points: Visa stablecoin settlement expands to nine blockchains, signaling growing on‑chain payments demand.
MoonPay’s institutional launch led by former CFTC acting chair boosts professional inflow.
Technical price holds above MA20 with RSI-14 showing nascent upside momentum.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD eyes upside as stablecoin adoption and institutional crypto infra boost fundamentals, technicals turn bullish.
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish fundamentals from stablecoin adoption and institutional infrastructure align with technical support at MA20 and rising RSI.
